title: Speculation Evangelion 30 Release Date
wikitext:
[]: Speculation: Evangelion 3.0 Release Date?? Post by MarioAyanami128 » Tue Feb 01, 2011 2:52 pm This site claims that it received a confirmation of the release date of Q Quickening! I´m not exactly sure if this information is true, but the translation of what´s written in portuguese there states that the film will be released in Japan on January 8th, 2012. Tell me what you guys think about it! Here´s the link: http://www.dignow.org/post/evangelion-2-22-nos-cinemas-americanos-589101-25216.html

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Feb 01, 2011 2:55 pm I wouldn't believe it.

[]: Post by MarioAyanami128 » Tue Feb 01, 2011 3:27 pm Oh yeah?? And why is that?

[]: Post by esselfortium » Tue Feb 01, 2011 3:40 pm Because a random Portuguese site doesn't know any better than we or anyone else does. Until we get an announcement from Khara or someone directly affiliated with them, anyone claiming to know a release date is BSing.

[]: Post by MarioAyanami128 » Tue Feb 01, 2011 3:47 pm esselfortium wrote: Because a random Portuguese site doesn't know any better than we or anyone else does. Until we get an announcement from Khara or someone directly affiliated with them, anyone claiming to know a release date is BSing.

[]: Post by Azathoth » Tue Feb 01, 2011 3:48 pm MarioAyanami128 wrote: If you really think that the U.S. is the one that gets the news first and is priviledged, think again.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Feb 01, 2011 3:51 pm MarioAyanami128 wrote: Wow. That´s a bit biased, don´t you think? How do you know that? Firstly, it´s a Brazilian site, not a Portuguese one.

[]: Post by Xard » Tue Feb 01, 2011 3:54 pm MarioAyanami128 wrote: Wow. That´s a bit biased, don´t you think? How do you know that? Firstly, it´s a Brazilian site, not a Portuguese one. If you really think that the U.S. is the one that gets the news first and is priviledged, think again. This site never got one mistake on a release date (it showed the Eva 2.0 release date long before the Americans even heard of the date). Also, on that same site, it says FUNimation is investing on a launch of the Eva 2.22 DVD and Blu-ray in that same country on February 28th (and it has been confirmed on other sites as well), one month before the U.S. gets a look at it.

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Feb 01, 2011 4:00 pm Don't want to attack anyone. I'll just wait until the Rebuild movie website makes a statement before I get excited. It is true if this news is going to break anywhere it'll be Japan first, not in what is an ancillary market for Eva. I hope we're near a Rebuild 3.0 release date. I believe a 2011 release date is still going to be the case but we'll just have to wait and see.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Feb 01, 2011 4:02 pm I also distrust this article because if even throws Live Action Evangelion into the mix, and erroneously cites Shinji Aramaki as being involved. That's a first as far as I'm aware.

[]: Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Tue Feb 01, 2011 4:18 pm Darn it now I'm disappointed, I read the title thinking "HOLY S**T!".

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Feb 01, 2011 4:21 pm Changed the topic title accordingly so it wouldn't get anyone else's hopes up. Japanese sources are a good way to confirm whether or not something's true, and so far nothing popped up on IRC news feed about release dates.

[]: Post by NAveryW » Tue Feb 01, 2011 4:48 pm Why would you guys be excited about the release date being a year away?

[]: Post by KnightmareX13 » Tue Feb 01, 2011 4:50 pm NAveryW wrote: Why would you guys be excited about the release date being a year away?

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Feb 01, 2011 4:59 pm KnightmareX13 wrote: uh, because it is better than no release date.

[]: Post by C.A.P. » Tue Feb 01, 2011 5:13 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Ignorance is bliss.

[]: Post by MarioAyanami128 » Tue Feb 01, 2011 5:13 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I also distrust this article because if even throws Live Action Evangelion into the mix, and erroneously cites Shinji Aramaki as being involved. That's a first as far as I'm aware.

[]: Post by Clover » Tue Feb 01, 2011 5:23 pm That's not fall 2011. If this is true, this movie better make me cum buckets out of my eyes. 3 year gap.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Feb 01, 2011 5:26 pm Clover wrote: That's not fall 2011.

[]: Post by Legendary » Tue Feb 01, 2011 5:32 pm MarioAyanami128 wrote: Remember that the country in question has the largest Japanese population in the world outside Japan.
